situation.headline: Iran war blockade impasse threatens global energy chokepoint as Trump-Xi summit fails to resolve underlying geopolitical fractures

domains.name: Middle East
domains.label: regional escalation 90d
domains.status: US-Iran dual blockade of Hormuz strait continues despite ceasefire with only 5% normal shipping traffic

domains.name: Indo-Pacific
domains.label: China coercion escalation
domains.status: China leveraging Xi-Trump summit to consolidate position while maintaining Taiwan pressure and rare earth leverage

domains.name: Europe
domains.label: NATO cohesion fracture
domains.status: NATO unanimously adopted 5% GDP defense target with 20% European spending increase but US allies concerned about burden

domains.name: Energy
domains.label: supply shock 60d
domains.status: Strait of Hormuz throughput at 5% of normal levels creating biggest energy security threat in history according to IEA

domains.name: US Politics
domains.label: House flip Nov 2026
domains.status: Congressional Republicans blocking Iran war resolution votes while Democrats criticize lack of authorization for Venezuela and Iran

situation.unseen: Venezuela operation has created template for direct kinetic capture missions that could be applied globally while Iran conflict is driving unprecedented European defense integration and NATO spending commitments that exceed US fiscal capacity to sustain alliance burden sharing expectations
situation.criticalWindow: Iran ceasefire negotiations deadline approaching within 2 weeks as dual blockade becomes economically unsustainable for both sides and regional states pressure for resolution
watchFor: Iran nuclear deal collapse triggers Israeli unilateral strikes
Trump cancels Xi September meeting over Taiwan tensions
Saudi Arabia cuts US basing access over Iran policy
European NATO states activate Article 4 consultations over burden sharing
situation.confidenceNote: High confidence on energy crisis trajectory and timeline but Iran negotiations remain opaque with conflicting readouts on deal proximity and key uncertainties around Chinese rare earth restrictions effectiveness
situation.topPattern: Traditional alliance structures fracturing under simultaneous energy crisis and burden sharing pressures while China exploits US overextension to consolidate regional influence through economic coercion rather than military confrontation

markets.label: GOP Keeps House 2026
markets.rationale: Special election overperformance, retirements, low approval. House flip is base case.

markets.label: Ukraine Ceasefire 2026
markets.rationale: Trump wants exit, Ukraine exhausted, Europe pushing. Russia sees no urgency.

markets.label: China Invades Taiwan 2026
markets.rationale: Window opening but 2027 remains primary PLA readiness target. Gray zone more likely.

markets.label: Oil >$120/bbl 2026
markets.rationale: Hormuz disruption plus supply shock already in progress.

markets.label: Iran Nuclear Deal 2026
markets.rationale: Kinetic operations make diplomatic track nearly impossible near term.

markets.label: Russia Takes Kyiv
markets.rationale: Russia lacks manpower and logistics for capital seizure.
